ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genomic_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genomic feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the genomic feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genomic feature */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome where the feature is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the genomic feature */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the genomic feature */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand information (positive or negative) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the genomic feature data */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the genomic feature data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "decision_trees" (
  "tree_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each decision tree */,
  "tree_name" TEXT /* Name of the decision tree */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the decision tree */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used to create the decision tree */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the decision tree algorithm */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the decision tree model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the decision tree was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the decision tree */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tree_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature value */,
  "tree_id" INTEGER /* ID of the decision tree */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic feature */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the genomic feature for the decision tree */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the feature value */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the feature value data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the feature value was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the feature value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_values_tree_id FOREIGN KEY ("tree_id") REFERENCES decision_trees ("tree_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_values_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES genomic_features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistical_values" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical value */,
  "value_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature value */,
  "p_val1" REAL /* P-value for the feature value (alternative hypothesis) */,
  "p_val0" REAL /* P-value for the feature value (null hypothesis) */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of statistical test used */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the statistical value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the statistical value was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the statistical value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistical_values_value_id FOREIGN KEY ("value_id") REFERENCES feature_values ("value_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the researcher account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the researcher account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher leading the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the study */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the study was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_features" (
  "study_feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study feature */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic feature */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the genomic feature for the study */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the study feature value */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the study feature value data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the study feature value was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the study feature value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_features_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES genomic_features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_features_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)
